part.productName: Iridium IX Spark Plug — Iridium IX
part.bullet1: The ultimate in the evolution of spark plug technology and performance from the industry leader
part.bullet2: The iridium electrode is 25% smaller than a platinum electrode, and it's just 1/4 the size of a conventional nickel electrode
part.bullet3: Ultra-small diameter center electrode reduces voltage requirement and extends ignition system life
part.bullet4: New metal shell plating has enhanced anti-corrosion qualities

part.bullet1: Trivalent metal plating provides superior anti-corrosion and anti-seizing properties
part.bullet2: Pure alumina silicate ceramic insulator, provides superior strength and better heat transfer
part.bullet5: Copper core aids in heat removal
